---
title: "Unrefereed Course Notes"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)

note_entries <- c("Title", "Author", "Subject", "Pages", "University", "Contact", "Abstract")

note_data <- c("Theory of Equations", "Creswell, Sam << Wall, H.S.", "foundations", "46", "", "screswell@alamo.edu", "These notes constitute an introduction to the number system, plane geometry, polynomials, and location of roots. This sophomore level course was developed and taught by Dr. Wall in an effort to introduce students to axiomatic mathematics at an early stage of their mathematical development.")


tibble(note_entries, note_data) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_align(align = "left") |>
  tab_style(
    style= cell_text(v_align = "top"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) |>
  tab_options( table.width = "80%", column_labels.hidden = TRUE)  


```
- [Download File](./foundations-of-mathematics_cresswell.pdf)

This course guide was donated to a collection originally gathered by MathNerds. The author retains copyright. You are free to use these materials for your classes.
